scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d && docker compose -f apps/processing-service/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait
scripts.infra:down: docker compose down && docker compose -f apps/processing-service/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.reset:down: pnpm --filter @repo/pulumi down:dev && pnpm localstack:down && pnpm infra:down
scripts.reset:up: pnpm setup:local && pnpm localstack:up && pnpm --filter @repo/pulumi up:dev
